deblur.positive: Sharpen this exact photo and recover fine detail. Keep natural, neutral, realistic colors - do not oversaturate or make it look computer-generated. Keep every object, person and background exactly as in the input, removing haze only where present. Photorealistic.
deblur.negative: oversaturated, boosted colors, computer-generated look, repainted, changed people, distortion, artifacts

relight_day.positive: Convert this scene to clear bright midday daylight - blue sky, real sunlight, natural shadows. Keep every object, person, vehicle and especially the text on signs sharp and unchanged in position and shape; only the lighting and sky change. Photorealistic.
relight_day.negative: night, dim, warped text, melted signs, blurry signs, added objects, removed objects, changed scene, distortion, artifacts

object_insert_fire.positive: Add a real fire that has broken out on a solid surface that physically exists in this scene (the floor or an object), placed where it makes sense for the room's geometry: natural spreading flames with smoke and embers. Place fire only on solid ground, never on water. Keep all people, objects and the background unchanged and normally lit. Photorealistic.
object_insert_fire.negative: fire on water, floating fire, wrong perspective, campfire, full-frame fire, changed people, distortion, artifacts

normalize.positive: Apply only a gentle, neutral photographic clean-up: balanced exposure, natural white balance and realistic true-to-life colors. The result MUST look like a real unedited photograph, not an over-saturated AI render. Keep all content, objects, people and the type of lighting exactly the same. Photorealistic.
normalize.negative: oversaturated, vivid filter, AI render look, stylized, changed content, added objects, removed objects, distortion, artifacts

change_clothing.positive: Dress every person already in this photo - including anyone in a uniform or work clothes - in a full colorful clown costume (baggy polka-dot suit, ruffled collar, big shoes, clown hat). Keep their real faces with NO face paint and NO clown makeup. Keep exactly the same number of people, each in their original position and natural pose; do not replace anyone with new static clowns and do not add or remove people. Keep the same background. Photorealistic.
change_clothing.negative: clown makeup, face paint, static pose, replaced people, new people, added people, removed people, changed background, distortion, artifacts
